evidence_summary: Lead List & Create Page Tests (DELTA, test-authoring only, NO production code changed). Closed the lead-list.tsx component-integration coverage gap (36.9% -> 100% statements / 100% lines / 81.2% branches / 98.8% functions): filtering (status/score), sorting, bulk operations (convert/status/archive/delete dialogs + runners with selected-rows contract), row actions with status gating (Qualify only for NEW/CONTACTED, Convert only for QUALIFIED, neither for CONVERTED), status/score badges, date formatting, and per-mutation onSuccess/onError toasts. Extended lead-list.test.tsx (22 -> 61 tests). Added LeadsPageClient.test.tsx (thin-wrapper isolation, 100%). Added T-012 in lead.router.security.test.ts pinning lead.list role filter (ADMIN sees all; non-admin sees own). TypeCheck (web+api), Lint, Build (web+api), and full test suites all GREEN; codex-review converged PASS.

notes: Test-authoring task — NO production source modified, so Sonar new_coverage (changed production lines) has no exposure; the binding metric is whole-file coverage. The create page (NewLeadForm 93.9%) and the bulk-actions.ts helper (51 tests) were already covered and intentionally out of scope. The async server (list)/page.tsx shell is excluded by repo convention (logic lives in the tested client island); its surface is covered via lead-list.test.tsx + LeadsPageClient.test.tsx. Spec/plan multi-persona debate + a real plan-reviewer subagent (2 ERRORs caught and fixed pre-exec) ran per the full pipeline. Session issues log: docs/operations/sprint-18-ifc-248-session-issues-log.md.
